project.title: Multiplexed Exosome proteomics from mouse tissues
project.projectDescription: Comparison of exosomal proteome among different cell types
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: LC-MS2 data collection strategy on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribird mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific) equipped with a Thermo Easy-nLC 1200
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were searched against a Uniprot Mouse database with both the forward and reverse sequences. Database search criteria are as follows: tryptic with two missed cleavages, a precursor mass tolerance of 50 ppm, fragment bin tolerance of 0.02, static alkylation of cysteine (57.02146 Da), static TMT labeling of lysine residues and N-termini of peptides (304.2071 Da), and variable oxidation of methionine (15.99491 Da). TMT reporter ion intensities were measured using a 0.003 Da window around the theoretical m/z for each reporter ion. Proteins with <200 summed signal-to-noise across all channels and <0.5 precursor isolation specificity were excluded from the final dataset.
